FFmpeg (Windows x64) — bundled with this application
=====================================================

Version    : FFmpeg master (BtbN "latest" LGPL 静的ビルド)
             ※ 実バイナリは scripts/fetch-ffmpeg.js がビルド時に取得するため、
               正確な版は `ffmpeg.exe -version` で確認できます。
License    : LGPL v3 (built with --enable-version3, WITHOUT --enable-gpl
             and WITHOUT --enable-nonfree; --disable-libx264 --disable-libx265
             --disable-libxvid --disable-libfdk-aac)
Build      : BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds  "win64-lgpl" static build
Build repo : https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds
Source code: https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg
Fetch URL  : https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds/releases/download/latest/ffmpeg-master-latest-win64-lgpl.zip

This application invokes ffmpeg.exe as a separate process only to decode
audio/video files to 16 kHz mono PCM. FFmpeg is not linked into the
application. The binary is redistributed unmodified.

The corresponding source code for this FFmpeg build is available from the
FFmpeg project (link above) and the BtbN build scripts (link above).

License texts are provided alongside this application:
  licenses/lgpl-3.0.txt  (GNU Lesser General Public License v3)
  licenses/gpl-3.0.txt   (GNU General Public License v3, referenced by LGPL v3)
